subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename server route file and API paths from Pulse to Tasks
description:
Rename the Express route file and update all API path prefixes from `/api/pulse/` to `/api/tasks/`.

## File Rename

Rename `apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts` to `apps/server/src/routes/tasks.ts`.

## Function Rename

Rename `createPulseRouter()` to `createTasksRouter()`.

## Route Path Updates

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `GET /api/pulse/schedules` | `GET /api/tasks` |
| `POST /api/pulse/schedules` | `POST /api/tasks` |
| `PATCH /api/pulse/schedules/:id` | `PATCH /api/tasks/:id` |
| `DELETE /api/pulse/schedules/:id` | `DELETE /api/tasks/:id` |
| `POST /api/pulse/schedules/:id/trigger` | `POST /api/tasks/:id/trigger` |
| `GET /api/pulse/runs` | `GET /api/tasks/runs` |
| `GET /api/pulse/runs/:id` | `GET /api/tasks/runs/:id` |
| `POST /api/pulse/runs/:id/cancel` | `POST /api/tasks/runs/:id/cancel` |
| `GET /api/pulse/presets` | `GET /api/tasks/templates` |

Note the flattening: `/api/pulse/schedules` becomes `/api/tasks` (not `/api/tasks/tasks`). The schedules sub-path is dropped since tasks ARE the top-level resource now.

## Update route registration in `apps/server/src/index.ts`

Change the import and mount point:
```typescript
// Before:
import { createPulseRouter } from './routes/pulse.js';
app.use('/api/pulse', createPulseRouter(store, scheduler));

// After:
import { createTasksRouter } from './routes/tasks.js';
app.use('/api/tasks', createTasksRouter(taskStore, taskScheduler));
```

Update the variable names passed to the router factory to match the renamed services from task 1.3.

## Update OpenAPI registry

Update any OpenAPI route registrations in the route file. Change tag from `'Pulse'` to `'Tasks'`. Update operation IDs (e.g., `listSchedules` -> `listTasks`, `createSchedule` -> `createTask`).

## Update the HttpTransport in the client

Update `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/transport/http-transport.ts` to call the new API paths:
- `/api/pulse/schedules` -> `/api/tasks`
- `/api/pulse/runs` -> `/api/tasks/runs`
- `/api/pulse/presets` -> `/api/tasks/templates`

Also update method names to match the renamed Transport interface (from task 1.1).

Update `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/transport/pulse-methods.ts` — rename to `task-methods.ts` and update all method implementations and paths.

## Update DirectTransport

Update `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/direct-transport.ts` and `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/embedded-mode-stubs.ts` — rename method stubs from `listSchedules` etc. to `listTasks` etc.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts` no longer exists
- `apps/server/src/routes/tasks.ts` exists with renamed router factory
- All API paths use `/api/tasks/` prefix
- OpenAPI tags and operation IDs updated
- Client HttpTransport updated to call new paths
- Client DirectTransport stubs updated
- `pulse-methods.ts` renamed to `task-methods.ts`
activeForm: Renaming server route file and API paths from Pulse to Tasks
